name: TestSetSendTimeout
title: TestSetSendTimeout
description: This function sets the timeout up to which the TestSendMostAMSMessage functions wait for a Tx acknowledgment for the sent message. This value is set to 5000 ms by default.

With the specification of a timeout value of 0, a wait of any length for the Tx acknowledgment is possible, while the specification of -1 means that the waiting for the acknowledgment is switched off, that is, there is no wait.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms]
